block_01: What are the tools that might help you enhance your trading approach? The truth is, there are many of them to choose from. Different chart types, graphical tools, indicators and other settings might be tricky to navigate through as there are multiple options.
block_02: How to use each of these tools and why do you need them? Of course, you could just use the default settings for everything. But this approach does not always allow you to take advantage of these trading tools. In this article we will be explaining how to set them according to your personal preference.
block_03: Read the full version to learn more.
